revision_priority: Add a real deep-learning proof point to the most relevant experience/project and surface `Deep Learning` in Skills only after the body evidence exists.
Rewrite the Summary to lead with model development/evaluation and the trustworthiness angle, not with generic analytics-to-ML transition language.
Add body evidence for each JD must-have technology instead of leaving it only in Skills or Summary.
revision_instructions: Keep all immutable fields exactly as-is. Rewrite `Professional Summary` so the first sentence leads with an Applied Researcher / model-development / evaluation signal, the second sentence supports it with concrete ML system execution, and the third Go sentence stays as the high-value cognition line. In `Skills`, do not delete existing ML, RAG, Bedrock, or systems items; instead, add `Deep Learning` only if you also add at least one body bullet that proves it, and add `PyTorch` or `NLP` only if they are truly supported by a bullet. In the most relevant experience, replace the weakest generic ML bullet with a concrete deep-learning bullet that names the model family or framework, the task, the training or evaluation setup, and the measured outcome. If the candidate does not have truthful deep-learning work, this JD fit remains weak and the resume should not pretend otherwise. In all sections outside `## Skills`, unbold modifiers like `team-maintained`, `bounded`, and `lightweight`; keep bolding limited to technical nouns, proper nouns, and metrics.
